concerns.text: FR-007 specifies 6 GB RAM limit but SC-005 and Edge Cases reference 7 GB RAM constraint. This inconsistency could cause test failures. Align to single value (recommend 7 GB to match runner constraint).

Assumptions section states 'FR-005 shall include sensitivity analysis across δ variations' but FR-005 is defined as permutation importance and SHAP plots. Either update FR-005 to include sensitivity analysis or remove this reference from Assumptions.
